title: open statements
text: open statements Specify the number of statements held open by the connector. USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = open statements : Number USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = os : Number Arguments Number —the number of statements to be held open. If not specified, the default number of statements maintained is 128. Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax DB2 connector DB2 USYS$DB2_PARAMS ODBC connector ODx USYS$ODx_PARAMS MS SQL connector MSS USYS$MSS_PARAMS MySQL connector MQL USYS$MQL_PARAMS Description This option specifies the number of statements that the connector maintains in administration before closing the last recently used one.
